# 🔒  Last Chance: Hack-Proof Your WordPress Site (Free Workshop - Feb 17th)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-10 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 512

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Time is running out to grab your spot in our FREE WordPress
Security Workshop!

Are you ready to finally take control of your website's safety
and stop living in fear of hackers?

For too many WordPress users, website security feels like a
daunting task, filled with confusing technical terms and
expensive tools. But it doesn't have to be that way...

That's why we're hosting this free workshop to show you the
simple, actionable steps you can take right now to dramatically
improve your WordPress security.

It's happening soon – February 17th at 10:30 am EST!

Join us for free: Ultimate WordPress Security Secrets for a
Hack-Proof Website! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.t9j2NhXYLLjHYisIRndjAfh24XRubxhQ-Sk_eRdS3zI )

In this workshop, Ryan Priddey will walk you through the exact
security strategies I've used on my sites in a way that's easy to
understand.

Here’s a sneak peek of what you’ll learn:

* Uncover Common WordPress Security Holes: Learn to identify
vulnerabilities like weak passwords and outdated plugins, and how
to fix them fast.
* Easy Security Tweaks (You Can Do Today!): Discover quick
changes you can implement immediately to boost your site's
defenses.
* Must-Have Security Plugins: Find out which plugins are
essential, and how to set them up for maximum protection without
slowing down your site.
* Your Ongoing Security Checklist: Get a simple plan to keep your
website secure against future threats.

Time is ticking! Protect your website and your peace of mind.

👉 Claim Your FREE Spot Now — Workshop is February 17th! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.t9j2NhXYLLjHYisIRndjAfh24XRubxhQ-Sk_eRdS3zI )

We can't wait to see you there and help you make your WordPress
website truly secure!

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
